use_cases.label: Support refund triage
use_cases.activity_summary: A support operations manager reviews refund escalation cases and decides approve, policy review, or missing evidence.

use_cases.label: Field service dispatch
use_cases.activity_summary: A field operations manager assigns, reschedules, or escalates a repair visit using route, parts, and SLA constraints.

use_cases.label: Clinical intake review
use_cases.activity_summary: An intake coordinator reviews administrative appointment readiness and decides schedule, return missing forms, or escalate insurance verification.

use_cases.label: B2B renewal risk review
use_cases.activity_summary: A customer success manager reviews renewal risk and decides save plan, executive escalation, or wait for usage evidence.
